typecheck.command: xcodebuild build-for-testing -project OpenBurnBar.xcodeproj -scheme OpenBurnBar -destination "platform=macOS,arch=arm64" -clonedSourcePackagesDirPath .spm-cache -derivedDataPath .derived-data/ci-typecheck CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO

appliedUpdates.description: Added `test_core_cli_launch_invoker` command alias to keep runtime-orchestration Branch B validator coverage represented in `.factory/services.yaml`.
Added `test_daemon_val_exec_009` command alias so supported supplemental assertion-filter validation is discoverable from the command source of truth.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Split Work Procedure steps 3/5 by branch so Branch B (CLI-launch reliability) does not inherit daemon-runtime-specific lifecycle/reconciliation checks that do not apply.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review `misc-runtime-skill-scope-alignment` found non-blocking ambiguity: SKILL.md Work Procedure still references daemon run lifecycle/reconciliation checks even when Branch B is selected.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit enforcement language (or lintable handoff checklist hook) that `followedProcedure=true` requires evidence entries for every required validator surface for the selected branch, and require deviations when any required surface is omitted.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both milestone reviews observed handoffs marking `followedProcedure=true` without full required branch-surface evidence despite existing text requiring it.

rejectedObservations.observation: Mission/source-of-truth ambiguity between assertion-filter usage and `.factory/services.yaml` coverage was reported in both reviews.
